title: rhytidophyllum exsertum subsp. villosulum
intro: Rhytidophyllum exsertum subsp. villosulum, also known as a type of moss or liverwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Calypogeiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to help treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rhytidophyllum exsertum subsp. villosulum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
